---
title: "Designing Anticipatory Action Trigger Models for Humanitarian Disaster Response"
---

# Welcome

This guide explains how statistical trigger models can be used to support anticipatory humanitarian disaster response. It walks through the process of designing, evaluating, and stress-testing trigger systems that translate probabilistic forecasts into operational decisions.

Use the chapters in this guide to learn how to structure datasets, build trigger models, evaluate performance, and document decisions in a transparent and reproducible way.
